LanguageData.Badger_MainTurret.description: A powerful turret mounted on a Badger Infantry Fighting Vehicle. Its explosive shots deal significant damage to enemy infantry, but it’s low armor-piercing makes it subpar against armored targets, and it uses up a lot of ammo.
LanguageData.Badger_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: single
LanguageData.Badger_MainTurret.fireModes.1.label: burst
LanguageData.Badger_MainTurret.label: badger chain gun
